title: Loop A stage_review hands devil's-advocate an empty regime_stats_dossier
source: loop-a-tick #13 (2026-05-26): all 3 DA reviews of the BULL_STRESSED T013 lineage BLOCKED with the SAME #1 high-severity objection.
why: In scripts/loop_a_tick.py stage_review, the DA decision payload is built via dad.make_decision_payload with regime_stats_dossier={} and audit_audit_findings={} (both empty). The proposal's causal_story cites concrete dossier stats (e.g. real_yield median quantile 0.31, corr -0.485 with roc_63, COT z52w median 0.27), but the DA cannot see the dossier to verify them. Every revision in tick #13's T013->D1->D2 lineage was BLOCKED on this exact unverifiability, exhausting the full DA-retry budget (2) without the hypothesizer ever being able to resolve it -- it is a payload-assembly defect outside the hypothesizer's control. Net effect: the DA-retry loop can burn its entire budget on a blocker no proposal revision can clear, wasting hypothesizer dispatches and guaranteeing da_blocked.
value_rationale: High: the empty dossier silently neuters the DA's core verification function and makes the B0037 DA-retry loop structurally incapable of converging when the binding objection is dossier-grounded. Fix is small (thread the staged dossier into make_decision_payload) but unblocks the whole adversarial-review contract.
recommendation: Thread the regime_stats_dossier captured at stage_propose (already written to the next_action payload) through to stage_review's DA decision_payload so the DA receives the same dossier the hypothesizer saw. Consider also passing M3 audit_audit_findings if available. Secondary: when the DA-retry budget is exhausted while >=1 high-severity objection persists, the DA itself recommended escalating to the daily skeptic/human rather than silently recording da_blocked.
out_of_scope: Not changing the lookahead firewall -- the dossier the DA sees must be the same regime-aggregate, point-in-time dossier the hypothesizer received, NOT raw OHLCV or episode-conditional data.

history.reason: Fixed: stage_review now threads the current tick dossier into make_decision_payload(regime_stats_dossier=...). Regression test tests/phase5/test_b0043_da_dossier_threading.py pins it; full suite 582 passed. Secondary considerations from the recommendation (named-episode-ordinal lookahead, an explicit escalate_human outcome when DA-retry budget exhausts with a live high-severity blocker) are NOT in this fix and remain open as potential follow-ups.
chore(loop-a): record tick 13 â€” BULL_STRESSED, da_blocked
fix(B0043): thread regime_stats_dossier into the devil's-advocate payload
